ham.subject: Jira Ticket #12345 Resolved – Review & Merge Request
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I am pleased to inform you that the issue reported in Jira ticket #12345 has been fully resolved in the latest commit (commit hash: a1b2c3d). All unit tests pass, and the regression tests have been updated accordingly.

**Resolution Summary**
- Fixed null‑pointer exception in the UserService when retrieving profile data.
- Added comprehensive validation for the new API endpoint.
- Updated integration tests to reflect the new contract.

**Next Steps**
1. Review the changes in the `feature/12345-fix` branch.
2. Run the full test suite locally to ensure no side‑effects.
3. If all checks pass, create a pull request for merging into `main`.

If you have any questions or spot anything that needs further tweaking, please let me know.

Thanks for your collaboration!

Best,
Alex
Software Engineer

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks & Norton Invoice #98765 Unpaid – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that your QuickBooks account is currently in arrears. Invoice #98765 for the amount of $1,234.56 has remained unpaid for over 30 days. Failure to settle this balance will result in an automatic suspension of your QuickBooks and Norton services by 5:00 PM today.

To avoid any disruption, please log into your account via the secure portal at <URL> and complete payment immediately. Your account details are listed below for your convenience:

- Account ID: 654321
- Outstanding Balance: $1,234.56
- Due Date: 09/30/2026

Please treat this matter with the utmost urgency. If you believe this notice was sent in error, contact our billing department at <URL> within 24 hours.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Billing Operations Team
QuickBooks & Norton
